briefdescription.para: Green slow blink (1000 ms) — CAN healthy, no data flowing.
Green solid — CAN healthy and data flowing (DCS exports / CTRL_BCAST)
Red fast blink (250 ms) — TEC > 0, errors accumulating.
Red/green alternating (500 ms) — app-layer degraded state.
CONNECTED → NORMAL after this idle gap.
